name: THE NUMBER PUZZLE
description: Test your brain with the ultimate Sudoku challenge! Enjoy hours of number puzzle fun with this classic Sudoku game, designed for players of all skill levels. Fill the 9×9 grid with numbers 1 through 9 so that every row, column, and 3×3 box contains each number exactly once. Whether you’re a beginner or a Sudoku master, this game sharpens your mind and improves logic skills. Features include: Multiple difficulty levels – Easy, Medium, Hard, and Expert. Intuitive controls and smooth gameplay. Timer to challenge your speed and accuracy. Undo & hint system to help you solve tricky puzzles.
instructions: Mouse Touch Click or tap on a cell to select it then click tap a number to fill it Keyboard Use number keys 1 ndash 9 to fill the selected cell Undo Hint Use on-screen buttons to undo moves or get hints
